```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;">

 <div style="position:relative;background:#F8F7F0;border:2px solid #5654A2;border-radius:14px;padding:1.2em 1.5em;margin-bottom:1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);">
  <div style="position:absolute;top:0.4em;left:0.7em;font-family:'Georgia',serif;font-size:3em;color:#5654A2;line-height:0.7;opacity:0.18;user-select:none;">"</div>
  <div style="font-family:'Georgia','TsangerJinKai',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:0.95em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.5;">
   Find the simplest solution possible.<br>
   <strong style="color:#C4881A;font-style:normal;">Only increase complexity when needed.</strong>
  </div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.3em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;margin-bottom:0.7em;">
  <span style="background:#5654A2;color:#F8F7F0;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;">0</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">1</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">2</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">3</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">4</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">5</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid #C4C3E8;">6</span>
 </div>

 <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-weight:700;">
  stop at the earliest stage that works
 </div>
 <div style="margin-top:0.3em;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;font-style:italic;">
  most workflows never leave Stage 0.
 </div>

</div>
```
